name: Sandwich
description: Fresh sandwich made with toasted bread, lettuce, tomato, cheese, and grilled chicken. Served with a special homemade sauce that gives a rich and creamy flavor.

name: Kebab
description: Juicy grilled kebab made from seasoned beef, wrapped with soft flatbread, fresh vegetables, and garlic yogurt sauce. A perfect choice for meat lovers.

name: Cheese Burger
description: Classic cheeseburger with a thick beef patty, melted cheddar cheese, crispy lettuce, tomato slices, and house special burger sauce inside a soft sesame bun.

name: Fried Chicken
description: Golden crispy fried chicken marinated with special spices, crunchy outside and tender inside. Served hot and fresh for the best taste experience.

name: Pizza
description: Delicious pizza topped with mozzarella cheese, pepperoni, olives, and fresh vegetables on a thin crispy crust baked to perfection.

name: Spaghetti
description: Italian-style spaghetti served with rich tomato sauce, minced beef, herbs, and grated parmesan cheese for a balanced savory flavor.

name: Grilled Steak
description: Premium grilled steak cooked to your preferred level, seasoned with black pepper and herbs, served with mashed potatoes and fresh salad.

name: French Fries
description: Crispy golden french fries sprinkled with salt and served with tomato ketchup or creamy mayonnaise dipping sauce.

name: Fresh Juice
description: Refreshing fresh fruit juice made from seasonal fruits, no added sugar, packed with natural vitamins and nutrients.

name: Ice Cream
description: Creamy and smooth ice cream available in multiple flavors including chocolate, vanilla, and strawberry, topped with sweet syrup.

name: Double Sandwich
description: Double layer sandwich with extra chicken and cheese for a richer taste experience.

name: Spicy Kebab
description: Spicy grilled kebab with chili sauce and fresh vegetables wrapped in soft bread.

name: BBQ Burger
description: Beef burger topped with BBQ sauce, melted cheese, and crispy lettuce.

name: Chicken Burger
description: Crispy chicken burger with fresh vegetables and creamy sauce.

name: Hot Fried Chicken
description: Extra spicy fried chicken with crunchy coating and juicy inside.

name: Seafood Pizza
description: Pizza topped with shrimp, squid, mozzarella cheese and special seafood sauce.

name: Cheese Pizza
description: Classic cheese pizza with extra mozzarella and crispy crust.

name: Carbonara Spaghetti
description: Creamy carbonara spaghetti with bacon and parmesan cheese.

name: Medium Steak
description: Juicy medium-cooked steak served with mashed potatoes and vegetables.

name: Cheese Fries
description: Crispy fries topped with melted cheese and special sauce.

name: Orange Juice
description: Freshly squeezed orange juice rich in vitamin C.

name: Strawberry Juice
description: Sweet and refreshing strawberry juice made from fresh fruits.

name: Chocolate Ice Cream
description: Smooth chocolate ice cream topped with chocolate syrup.

name: Vanilla Ice Cream
description: Classic vanilla ice cream with creamy texture.

name: Mega Burger
description: Large burger with double beef patties and extra cheese.

name: Family Pizza
description: Large size pizza perfect for family sharing.

name: BBQ Steak
description: Grilled steak with BBQ sauce and herbs.

name: Garlic Fries
description: French fries tossed with garlic butter and herbs.

name: Mixed Juice
description: A refreshing mix of seasonal fruits blended together.

name: Special Kebab
description: Premium kebab with extra meat and special house sauce.
